g.title: Viewport background, two panel frames, header + footer bands
g.text: KIOSK-004 · selection → recenter + sidebar-replacement detail · 2026-05-19 · single-design v1a · rev 3 (NodeData collapse)
Lab fixture 800×480 × 2 stacked panels · ADR-015-pending substrate per README.md:36 · uniform detail layout for any node (kind from inventory)
Panel A — tag-3 selected (no-fix · LAST FIX framing)
Panel B — relay-2 selected (overdue · SAME layout as Panel A, different NodeData fields)
Palette: tools/sarcom-kiosk-lab/src/ui/palette.rs · BLUE #32b4ff · ORANGE #f0a030 · GREEN #40d080 · AMBER #eab308 · RED #ff3c3c · TEXT_BRIGHT #c0ccd8 · TEXT_DIM #6c7f92

Source-of-truth: KIOSK-004 ticket (post-collapse) · dev-log/2026-05-19-v1a-ui-data-model-collapse-nodedata.md · data.rs NodeData (post-refactor) · markers.rs:32-38, 231-237, 265-302 · pmtiles_map.rs:82-125

g.title: Panel A map area at x=20..500, y=90..516. Three-layer basemap per pmtiles_map.rs:82-125. tag-3 ghost at last_valid_fix_pos with selection halo. Other markers dimmed. Map performs 150 ms eased pan onto tag_visible_pos.
Panel A markers — tag-3 selected (ghost at last_valid_fix_pos, amber halo). Other markers dimmed.

Panel A sidebar-replacement detail — UNIFORM LAYOUT (same as Panel B). Back row → Node header → State strip → Key/value rows → NOT SHOWN block. tag-3 no-fix-specific: LAST FIX · {age} framing scoping lat/lon to last_valid_fix_pos, not sentinel current pos.
g.text: LAST FIX · 8 m ago — scopes lat/lon below
closed as v2+ deferral. Wire protocol does
not carry them; data model follows wire.

g.title: Panel A bottom strip — existing read-only PMTiles strip per app.rs:283-344.
Panel A map chrome — compass rose + scale bar only per tickets/README.md:26.
Panel B map area at x=20..500, y=610..1036. Same three-layer basemap as Panel A. relay-2 selected with amber halo around the cross marker.
Panel B markers — relay-2 selected (overdue, amber halo around cross). Other markers dimmed.

g.text: 150 ms eased pan onto relay pos

g.title: Panel B sidebar-replacement detail — IDENTICAL LAYOUT TO PANEL A. Different NodeData fields populated (relay-2 is gps_valid=true, no LAST FIX framing; no_battery_low so no battery row). Same NOT SHOWN block.
